---
title: "History of the foundation and of the chief incidents in the gradual establishment of St. Thomas\' Home, Basingstoke, the Winchester Diocesan Penitentiary for Friendless and Fallen Women"
---

## History of the foundation and of the chief incidents in the gradual establishment of St. Thomas\' Home, Basingstoke, the Winchester Diocesan Penitentiary for Friendless and Fallen Women

**Author:** The Rev. Reginald Bigg Wither
**Date:** 1887
**Imprint:** Basingstoke: Jacob

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
